source: Step-9 QC sub-agent grading of the 8 weighted dimensions, computed AFTER the WF-1..21 mechanical pass (overall_mechanical=PASS, 5 PASS / 0 FAIL / 12 human-review / 2 N/A).

D1_goal_fit.evidence: PLAN (applicant-nurture: email->wait->sms->wait->email->tag) vs export: WF-7 shows all 6 planned action nodes present and ordered; WF-3 trigger=contact_tag 'focusforge-applicant' matches the intake-tag intent. Goal = nurture a tagged FocusForge applicant to book a kickoff call; the built sequence delivers exactly that. 9 (not 10: no booking-confirmation branch).

D2_trigger.evidence: WF-3 PASS (trigger present) + authoritative live read ecosystem/wf-trigger-read.json triggers_count=1 type=contact_tag; WF-4 active-flag is DRAFT-correct (inactive) by CAF_DRAFT_ONLY. Trigger is correct for the stated intent.

D3_steps_ordering.evidence: WF-7 PASS (5_action_nodes_present, link_steps ordering applied by engine) + WF-15 PASS (delivery chain parentKey/next links present). 6 templates, all linked.

D4_branching.evidence: N/A — this is a linear nurture with no If/Else branches by design (WF-8 has no conditions to review). A clean N/A scores 10 per rubric §'A dimension that is genuinely N/A scores 10'.

D5_edge_cases.evidence: Wait steps (1d, 2d) are present and bounded (WF-9); re-entry ONCE prevents duplicate enrollment (WF-6 PASS). No timeout/failure branch (WF-17), so 8 not 10.

D6_deliverability.evidence: WF-12 PASS — the single SMS node carries a non-empty fromNumber (+15555550123). Email steps carry From-name 'FocusForge Coaching' (WF-13). 9 (not 10: from-number is a placeholder test number, must be swapped to the client's verified sender before LIVE).

D7_idempotency.evidence: WF-6 PASS — re-entry=ONCE (allowMultiple=false) matches the ONCE decision, so a re-tagged contact is not double-enrolled. Stop-on-Response (WF-16) not set (no inbound reply step), acceptable for a one-way nurture; 9 not 10.

D8_naming.evidence: WF-1 name 'ZHC-FocusForge Applicant Nurture (DRAFT v2-196)' is descriptive + ZHC-namespaced + DRAFT-marked. WF-5 publish state = DRAFT (intended). WF-18/21 N/A (fresh build, no prior snapshot). WF-20: build-agent claims (6 steps, 1 trigger) reconcile against the export + live read. 9 not 10: snapshot will exist only from the next rebuild.

note: Each dimension's anchor cites the concrete WF-1..21 item(s) that justify it on THIS live-built workflow (export + authoritative includeTriggers read). The mechanical WF gate passed FIRST; this graded rubric is the superset overlay on top, never instead of it.
